mapper.select: SELECT region_id, region_name, map_id, description, color, fill_opacity, stroke_width, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM regions WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT region_id, region_name, map_id, description, color, fill_opacity, stroke_width, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM regions WHERE region_id = #{regionId}

SELECT region_id, region_name, map_id, description, color, fill_opacity, stroke_width, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM regions WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regions (region_id, region_name, map_id, description, color, fill_opacity, stroke_width, is_active) VALUES (#{regionId}, #{regionName}, #{mapId}, #{description}, #{color}, #{fillOpacity}, #{strokeWidth}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE regions SET region_name = #{regionName}, map_id = #{mapId}, description = #{description}, color = #{color}, fill_opacity = #{fillOpacity}, stroke_width = #{strokeWidth}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE region_id = #{regionId}
